creator: greg@gcsl.com
text:
Whenever root logs in or email is received, the message "Date: Hostname
inetd[PID]:login_getclass:unknown class 'root'" is displayed on the master console.
Seems like a missing or erronous tab in a config file somewhere, but I'll be damned
if I can find where. Its more of a neusance than enything else, but I would
like to resolve it!

ANY TAKERS???

Greg Bedrossian (aka kgb)

Fix: 

Not as of yet!
How-To-Repeat: See above!
